# 30/60/90 Day Roadmap

## Days 1–30 — Core proof

Run:

1. EXP-001
2. EXP-002
3. EXP-013
4. EXP-014
5. EXP-015

Deliverables:

- compression proof;
- bionic-anchor verdict;
- operator-first verdict;
- initial compression ratio bands;
- highlight density rule.

## Days 31–60 — Context and placement proof

Run:

1. EXP-003
2. EXP-004
3. EXP-005
4. EXP-007
5. EXP-018

Deliverables:

- gaze-safe placement rulebook;
- visual-load adaptation rulebook;
- timing window;
- muted-first rules;
- mouth-safe guardrail.

## Days 61–90 — Platform and automation proof

Run:

1. EXP-010
2. EXP-011
3. EXP-026
4. EXP-027
5. EXP-030

Deliverables:

- platform performance data;
- initial adaptive router;
- conflict detector validation;
- eye-tracking efficiency estimates;
- ASOE MVP decision.
